Given this conflict, I think I should trust the user's direct instruction and implement a regex-based filter that strips XSS while keeping formatting intact—if the test fails, at least I followed what was explicitly asked.\n\nWriting the filter now... contexts\n6. Handles various encoding tricks and obfuscation\n\nLet me think about what XSS vectors typically look like and make sure I handle all common ones:\n\n1. `<script>alert(1)</script>` - basic script tag\n2. `<img src=x onerror=alert(1)>` - event handlers\n3. `<a href=\"javascript:alert(1)\">` - javascript: URI\n4. `<svg onload=alert(1)>` - SVG with event handler\n5. `<body onload=alert(1)>` - body event handler\n6. `<img src=\"x\" ONERROR=\"alert(1)\">` - case variations\n7. `<script>` with various encoding\n8. `<iframe src=\"javascript:alert(1)\">` - iframe\n9. `<object data=\"javascript:alert(1)\">` - object tag\n\nNow I'm going through additional attack vectors including embed tags, nested tag tricks that break out of contexts, HTML entity encoding in both attributes and URIs, alternative event handlers like mouseover and focus events, SVG script injection, and autofocus-based attacks that trigger handlers automatically.\n\nI'm also considering less common but still dangerous vectors like marquee animations, video source errors, and CSS expressions in older browsers. Now I need to build a comprehensive filter that accounts for case insensitivity, whitespace variations, different encoding schemes, null byte insertion, and quote style variations.\n\nBuilding the XSS filter... Removing event handlers and dangerous protocol schemes... I need to reconsider the constraint about preserving byte-identical output for clean HTML—my regex approach should handle that since nothing would match in valid HTML. I'm also thinking through edge cases like uppercase JavaScript protocols, HTML entity encoding, and embedded newlines, which means I might need to decode entities or use more sophisticated pattern matching before filtering. I need to implement a function that decodes HTML entities in attribute values, checks for dangerous protocols like `javascript:`, `vbscript:`, or `data:`, and removes or neutralizes those attributes. I'm also weighing whether to strip `<style>` tags entirely or just remove dangerous content within them—since the user wants to preserve as much HTML as possible and modern browsers don't execute CSS expressions, I'll focus on the protocol-based XSS vectors first. the task is asking me to remove all JavaScript entirely, so stripping `<script>` tags and event handlers makes sense. I need to be careful with my regex patterns to avoid matching anything in legitimate HTML, and I should consider whether to preserve SVG and style tags or remove them entirely given the \"preserve as much HTML as possible\" constraint.\n\nMy current approach of using regex to remove scripts and event handlers should work for SVG too, since those patterns will catch malicious content within SVG elements. But I'm realizing that `<foreignObject>` inside SVG can contain nested HTML with scripts, which complicates things—I might need to handle that edge case separately or accept that my current patterns won't catch everything.\n\nLooking at other XSS vectors like `<meta http-equiv=\"refresh\">` with javascript URLs and `<base>` tag redirection, I should handle those too. But the user's constraint is clear: only remove harmful substrings without altering the HTML structure. So I need to be surgical about what I remove—targeting just the dangerous attributes and tags, not wholesale removal of entire elements like SVG.\n\nWriting the filter function... Still writing sanitization logic... Still writing sanitization logic... Writing the file output...\n\nActually, I'm reconsidering the style attribute filtering—removing anything with `&#` entities might be too broad since legitimate HTML could use those in styles, but it's a reasonable security tradeoff. More importantly, I need to tighten up the event handler regex to catch variations like unquoted attribute values, spaces around the equals sign, and onerror appearing right after opening quotes.\n\nFor `<style>` tags, I should preserve them since modern browsers don't execute expressions or javascript: in CSS, so I'll only strip them if they contain obviously dangerous patterns. I'm also thinking through how to handle `<meta>` tags next.\n\nI'm realizing this is getting complicated, so I should take a more aggressive but targeted approach: remove known XSS vectors like `<script>` tags and event handlers, while being careful not to break legitimate HTML. The key is making sure my regex patterns don't accidentally match clean content. I'm torn between being thorough with XSS prevention and preserving as much HTML as possible—the task wants both. I'll take a pragmatic approach: remove script tags and event handlers entirely, neutralize dangerous URI schemes, and strip out tags like object, embed, and applet that are primarily XSS vectors, while keeping structural elements like iframes and SVGs but with their dangerous attributes removed. Now I'm removing event handler attributes by targeting the `on*` pattern in various contexts—both with leading whitespace and after quotes—then I'll move on to neutralizing dangerous URI schemes like javascript:, vbscript:, and data: in relevant attributes.\n\nSanitizing URI attributes... Finishing the style attribute filtering for both double and single quotes to catch expressions and script protocols, then wrapping up the function and adding the main execution block that reads the file, applies the XSS filter, and writes the cleaned content back.\n\nNow I'm realizing I need to be more careful with data URIs since `data:image/*` is legitimate for inline images, but `data:text/html` can execute JavaScript, so I should only block the dangerous variant. {"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01NYc6WmcFpy8GnFfk21fvUG","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01SrUYJs2not4TMcGUBAEbXi","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/app/filter.py","content":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n\"\"\"XSS filter: removes JavaScript from HTML files while preserving legitimate HTML structure.\"\"\"\nimport sys\nimport re\nimport html as html_module\n\n\ndef _decode_and_normalize(value):\n    \"\"\"Decode HTML entities and strip control chars for URI protocol detection.\"\"\"\n    decoded = html_module.unescape(value).strip()\n    # Remove whitespace and control characters for detection\n    return re.sub(r'[\\s\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]+', '', decoded).lower()\n\n\ndef _clean_uri_value(value):\n    \"\"\"Check if a URI value contains a dangerous protocol. Returns True if dangerous.\"\"\"\n    normalized = _decode_and_normalize(value)\n    if re.match(r'(?:javascript|vbscript):', normalized):\n        return True\n    # Block data: URIs except safe image types\n    if re.match(r'data:', normalized):\n        if re.match(r'data:image/(?!svg)', normalized):\n            return False  # safe image data URI\n        return True  # block data:text/html, data:image/svg+xml, etc.\n    return False\n\n\ndef filter_xss(content):\n    # Remove null bytes (used to bypass filters)\n    content = content.replace('\\x00', '')\n\n    # --- Remove <script> tags and content (multiple passes for nesting) ---\n    for _ in range(5):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<script\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</script\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    # Remove any remaining orphaned script tags\n    content = re.sub(r'</?script\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove dangerous tags entirely (with content) ---\n    for tag in ['object', 'embed', 'applet']:\n        for _ in range(3):\n            prev = content\n            content = re.sub(\n                r'<' + tag + r'\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</' + tag + r'\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I\n            )\n            if content == prev:\n                break\n        content = re.sub(r'</?'+ tag + r'\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove SVG tags (common XSS vector via inline script/event handlers) ---\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<svg\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</svg\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    content = re.sub(r'</?svg\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove <math> tags (can be used for XSS via maction/xlink) ---\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<math\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</math\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    content = re.sub(r'</?math\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove <base> tags (can redirect relative URLs) ---\n    content = re.sub(r'<base\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove <meta> tags with javascript/data in content ---\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'<meta\\b[^>]*(?:javascript|vbscript|data\\s*:)[^>]*/?\\s*>',\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # --- Remove all event handler attributes (on*) ---\n    # Handles: onclick=\"...\" onload='...' onerror=alert(1) etc.\n    # Must handle multiple event handlers on the same element\n    for _ in range(5):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'(\\s+)on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            '', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n\n    # Also handle event handlers right after tag name or other attributes without space\n    # e.g., <img/onerror=alert(1) or <\"ONERROR=...\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'(<[a-zA-Z][^>]*?)(/\\s*)on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            r'\\1\\2', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n\n    # --- Neutralize dangerous URIs in href, src, action, etc. ---\n    # Quoted attributes\n    def _replace_quoted_uri(m):\n        attr_name = m.group(1)   # e.g., href=\n        quote = m.group(2)       # \" or '\n        value = m.group(3)       # attribute value\n        if _clean_uri_value(value):\n            return attr_name + quote + quote\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    uri_attrs = r'(?:href|src|action|formaction|poster|codebase|dynsrc|lowsrc|background|xlink:href)'\n\n    # Double-quoted\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r'\\s*=\\s*)(\")([^\"]*?)\"',\n        _replace_quoted_uri, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    # Single-quoted\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r\"\\s*=\\s*)(')([^']*?)'\",\n        _replace_quoted_uri, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    # Unquoted\n    def _replace_unquoted_uri(m):\n        attr_name = m.group(1)\n        value = m.group(2)\n        if _clean_uri_value(value):\n            return attr_name + '\"\"'\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r'\\s*=\\s*)([^\\s\"\\'>=]+)',\n        _replace_unquoted_uri, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # --- Remove style attributes with dangerous content ---\n    # expression(), javascript:, vbscript:, or HTML entities that could hide these\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'\\s+style\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]*(?:expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:|url\\s*\\(\\s*[\"\\']?\\s*javascript)[^\"]*\"',\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"\\s+style\\s*=\\s*'[^']*(?:expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:|url\\s*\\(\\s*[\\\"']?\\s*javascript)[^']*'\",\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    # Also catch entity-encoded versions in style attributes\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'\\s+style\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]*&#[^\"]*\"',\n        lambda m: '' if 'script' in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower() or 'expression' in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower() else m.group(0),\n        content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"\\s+style\\s*=\\s*'[^']*&#[^']*'\",\n        lambda m: '' if 'script' in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower() or 'expression' in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower() else m.group(0),\n        content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # --- Remove <iframe> tags (common XSS/phishing vector) ---\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<iframe\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</iframe\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    content = re.sub(r'</?iframe\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove <style> tags that contain dangerous content ---\n    def _clean_style_tag(m):\n        tag_content = m.group(0)\n        inner = m.group(1) if m.lastindex else ''\n        lower_inner = html_module.unescape(inner).lower()\n        # Check for dangerous CSS\n        if re.search(r'expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:|url\\s*\\(\\s*[\"\\']?\\s*javascript', lower_inner):\n            return ''\n        # Check for HTML tags inside style (mutation XSS)\n        if re.search(r'<\\s*/?[a-zA-Z]', inner):\n            return ''\n        return tag_content\n\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'<style\\b[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</style\\s*>',\n        _clean_style_tag, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # --- Final pass: remove any remaining script-like patterns ---\n    # Handle <img src=x onerror=alert(1)> patterns that might have been missed\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'\\s+on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            '', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n\n    return content\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    if len(sys.argv) < 2:\n        print(\"Usage: python filter.py <html_file>\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    filepath = sys.argv[1]\n\n    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n\n    filtered = filter_xss(content)\n\n    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        f.write(filtered)\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":8883,"cache_read_input_tokens":26330,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":8883,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"2b92adfa-8d45-4da0-8943-5a974e8fc702","uuid":"89da9270-54b4-4600-a12d-4c320ded6653"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01X9Ci32EcwPDNCuYqFCJen5","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01L365SvxdECfPHLz4LzyKGT","name":"Bash","input":{"command":"cat > /tmp/test_clean.html << 'HTMLEOF'\n<!DOCTYPE html>\n<html>\n<head>\n    <title>Clean Page</title>\n    <style>body { color: red; }</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n    <h1>Hello World</h1>\n    <p>This is a <strong>clean</strong> paragraph.</p>\n    <table>\n        <tr><td>Cell 1</td><td>Cell 2</td></tr>\n    </table>\n    <a href=\"https://example.com\">Link</a>\n    <img src=\"image.png\" alt=\"An image\">\n    <div class=\"container\" id=\"main\" data-value=\"test\">\n        <ul>\n            <li>Item 1</li>\n            <li>Item 2</li>\n        </ul>\n    </div>\n</body>\n</html>\nHTMLEOF\ncp /tmp/test_clean.html /tmp/test_clean_orig.html && python3 /app/filter.py /tmp/test_clean.html && diff /tmp/test_clean_orig.html /tmp/test_clean.html && echo \"PASS: Clean HTML preserved byte-identical\"","description":"Test that clean HTML passes through unchanged"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2890,"cache_read_input_tokens":35213,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":2890,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":4,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"2b92adfa-8d45-4da0-8943-5a974e8fc702","uuid":"17029961-fd59-4373-9d72-c2ce11057875"}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_0188UxFJ4NLBbLPHKy16uyhc","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"One issue: `<img src=`javascript:alert(1)`>` - backtick-quoted attribute value. This is an older IE-specific thing and isn't standard HTML. Modern browsers would treat backticks as part of the value. Let me handle this.\n\nActually, in modern HTML parsers, backticks are treated as part of an unquoted attribute value. Since my unquoted regex uses `[^\\s\"'>=]+`, it would match ``javascript:alert(1)`` (assuming no spaces). {"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01A4iZvRD1ho9TWHYqS9o7iq","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→#!/usr/bin/env python3\n     2→\"\"\"XSS filter: removes JavaScript from HTML files while preserving legitimate HTML structure.\"\"\"\n     3→import sys\n     4→import re\n     5→import html as html_module\n     6→\n     7→\n     8→def _decode_and_normalize(value):\n     9→    \"\"\"Decode HTML entities and strip control chars for URI protocol detection.\"\"\"\n    10→    decoded = html_module.unescape(value).strip()\n    11→    # Remove whitespace and control characters for detection\n    12→    return re.sub(r'[\\s\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]+', '', decoded).lower()\n    13→\n    14→\n    15→def _clean_uri_value(value):\n    16→    \"\"\"Check if a URI value contains a dangerous protocol. Returns True if dangerous.\"\"\"\n    17→    normalized = _decode_and_normalize(value)\n    18→    if re.match(r'(?:javascript|vbscript):', normalized):\n    19→        return True\n    20→    # Block data: URIs except safe image types\n    21→    if re.match(r'data:', normalized):\n    22→        if re.match(r'data:image/(?!svg)', normalized):\n    23→            return False  # safe image data URI\n    24→        return True  # block data:text/html, data:image/svg+xml, etc.\n    25→    return False\n    26→\n    27→\n    28→def filter_xss(content):\n    29→    # Remove null bytes (used to bypass filters)\n    30→    content = content.replace('\\x00', '')\n    31→\n    32→    # --- Remove <script> tags and content (multiple passes for nesting) ---\n    33→    for _ in range(5):\n    34→        prev = content\n    35→        content = re.sub(r'<script\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</script\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n    36→        if content == prev:\n    37→            break\n    38→    # Remove any remaining orphaned script tags\n    39→    content = re.sub(r'</?script\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n    40→\n    41→    # --- Remove dangerous tags entirely (with content) ---\n    42→    for tag in ['object', 'embed', 'applet']:\n    43→        for _ in range(3):\n    44→            prev = content\n    45→            content = re.sub(\n    46→                r'<' + tag + r'\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</' + tag + r'\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I\n    47→            )\n    48→            if content == prev:\n    49→                break\n    50→        content = re.sub(r'</?'+ tag + r'\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n    51→\n    52→    # --- Remove SVG tags (common XSS vector via inline script/event handlers) ---\n    53→    for _ in range(3):\n    54→        prev = content\n    55→        content = re.sub(r'<svg\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</svg\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n    56→        if content == prev:\n    57→            break\n    58→    content = re.sub(r'</?svg\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n    59→\n    60→    # --- Remove <math> tags (can be used for XSS via maction/xlink) ---\n    61→    for _ in range(3):\n    62→        prev = content\n    63→        content = re.sub(r'<math\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</math\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n    64→        if content == prev:\n    65→            break\n    66→    content = re.sub(r'</?math\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n    67→\n    68→    # --- Remove <base> tags (can redirect relative URLs) ---\n    69→    content = re.sub(r'<base\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n    70→\n    71→    # --- Remove <meta> tags with javascript/data in content ---\n    72→    content = re.sub(\n    73→        r'<meta\\b[^>]*(?:javascript|vbscript|data\\s*:)[^>]*/?\\s*>',\n    74→        '', content, flags=re.I\n    75→    )\n    76→\n    77→    # Remove whitespace and control characters for detection\n    return re.sub(r'[\\s\\x00-\\x1f\\x7f]+', '', decoded).lower()\n\n\ndef _clean_uri_value(value):\n    \"\"\"Check if a URI value contains a dangerous protocol. Returns True if dangerous.\"\"\"\n    normalized = _decode_and_normalize(value)\n    if re.match(r'(?:javascript|vbscript):', normalized):\n        return True\n    # Block data: URIs except safe image types\n    if re.match(r'data:', normalized):\n        if re.match(r'data:image/(?!svg)', normalized):\n            return False  # safe image data URI\n        return True  # block data:text/html, data:image/svg+xml, etc.\n    return False\n\n\ndef filter_xss(content):\n    # Remove null bytes (used to bypass filters)\n    content = content.replace('\\x00', '')\n\n    # --- Remove <script> tags and content (multiple passes for nesting) ---\n    for _ in range(5):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<script\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</script\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    # Remove any remaining orphaned script tags\n    content = re.sub(r'</?script\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove dangerous tags entirely (with content) ---\n    for tag in ['object', 'embed', 'applet']:\n        for _ in range(3):\n            prev = content\n            content = re.sub(\n                r'<' + tag + r'\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</' + tag + r'\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I\n            )\n            if content == prev:\n                break\n        content = re.sub(r'</?'+ tag + r'\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove SVG tags (common XSS vector via inline script/event handlers) ---\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<svg\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</svg\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    content = re.sub(r'</?svg\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove <math> tags (can be used for XSS via maction/xlink) ---\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<math\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</math\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    content = re.sub(r'</?math\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove <base> tags (can redirect relative URLs) ---\n    content = re.sub(r'<base\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove <meta> tags with javascript/data in content ---\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'<meta\\b[^>]*(?:javascript|vbscript|data\\s*:)[^>]*/?\\s*>',\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # --- Remove all event handler attributes (on*) ---\n    # Handles: onclick=\"...\" onload='...' onerror=alert(1) etc.\n    # Must handle multiple event handlers on the same element\n    for _ in range(5):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'(\\s+)on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            '', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n\n    # Also handle event handlers right after tag name or other attributes without space\n    # e.g., <img/onerror=alert(1) or <\"ONERROR=...\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'(<[a-zA-Z][^>]*?)(/\\s*)on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            r'\\1\\2', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n\n    # --- Neutralize dangerous URIs in href, src, action, etc. ---\n    # Quoted attributes\n    def _replace_quoted_uri(m):\n        attr_name = m.group(1)   # e.g., href=\n        quote = m.group(2)       # \" or '\n        value = m.group(3)       # attribute value\n        if _clean_uri_value(value):\n            return attr_name + quote + quote\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    uri_attrs = r'(?:href|src|action|formaction|poster|codebase|dynsrc|lowsrc|background|xlink:href)'\n\n    # Double-quoted\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r'\\s*=\\s*)(\")([^\"]*?)\"',\n        _replace_quoted_uri, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    # Single-quoted\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r\"\\s*=\\s*)(')([^']*?)'\",\n        _replace_quoted_uri, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    # Unquoted\n    def _replace_unquoted_uri(m):\n        attr_name = m.group(1)\n        value = m.group(2)\n        if _clean_uri_value(value):\n            return attr_name + '\"\"'\n        return m.group(0)\n\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'(' + uri_attrs + r'\\s*=\\s*)([^\\s\"\\'>=]+)',\n        _replace_unquoted_uri, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # --- Remove style attributes with dangerous content ---\n    # expression(), javascript:, vbscript:, or HTML entities that could hide these\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'\\s+style\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]*(?:expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:|url\\s*\\(\\s*[\"\\']?\\s*javascript)[^\"]*\"',\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"\\s+style\\s*=\\s*'[^']*(?:expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:|url\\s*\\(\\s*[\\\"']?\\s*javascript)[^']*'\",\n        '', content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    # Also catch entity-encoded versions in style attributes\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'\\s+style\\s*=\\s*\"[^\"]*&#[^\"]*\"',\n        lambda m: '' if 'script' in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower() or 'expression' in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower() else m.group(0),\n        content, flags=re.I\n    )\n    content = re.sub(\n        r\"\\s+style\\s*=\\s*'[^']*&#[^']*'\",\n        lambda m: '' if 'script' in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower() or 'expression' in html_module.unescape(m.group(0)).lower() else m.group(0),\n        content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # --- Remove <iframe> tags (common XSS/phishing vector) ---\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(r'<iframe\\b[^>]*>[\\s\\S]*?</iframe\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n    content = re.sub(r'</?iframe\\b[^>]*/?\\s*>', '', content, flags=re.I)\n\n    # --- Remove <style> tags that contain dangerous content ---\n    def _clean_style_tag(m):\n        tag_content = m.group(0)\n        inner = m.group(1) if m.lastindex else ''\n        lower_inner = html_module.unescape(inner).lower()\n        # Check for dangerous CSS\n        if re.search(r'expression\\s*\\(|javascript\\s*:|vbscript\\s*:|url\\s*\\(\\s*[\"\\']?\\s*javascript', lower_inner):\n            return ''\n        # Check for HTML tags inside style (mutation XSS)\n        if re.search(r'<\\s*/?[a-zA-Z]', inner):\n            return ''\n        return tag_content\n\n    content = re.sub(\n        r'<style\\b[^>]*>([\\s\\S]*?)</style\\s*>',\n        _clean_style_tag, content, flags=re.I\n    )\n\n    # --- Final pass: remove any remaining script-like patterns ---\n    # Handle <img src=x onerror=alert(1)> patterns that might have been missed\n    for _ in range(3):\n        prev = content\n        content = re.sub(\n            r'\\s+on[a-zA-Z]+\\s*=\\s*(?:\"[^\"]*\"|\\'[^\\']*\\'|[^\\s>]*)',\n            '', content, flags=re.I\n        )\n        if content == prev:\n            break\n\n    return content\n\n\nif __name__ == '__main__':\n    if len(sys.argv) < 2:\n        print(\"Usage: python filter.py <html_file>\", file=sys.stderr)\n        sys.exit(1)\n\n    filepath = sys.argv[1]\n\n    with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8', errors='replace') as f:\n        content = f.read()\n\n    filtered = filter_xss(content)\n\n    with open(filepath, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        f.write(filtered)\n","numLines":211,"startLine":1,"totalLines":211}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01CADvZUNgTY4njCMao2PiLh","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"text","text":"The filter is working correctly:\n\n- **Clean HTML preservation**: Complex HTML with styles, tables, forms, images, links, comments, etc. passes through byte-identical\n- **Script removal**: `<script>` tags and content removed (handles mixed case, nested, unclosed)\n- **Event handler removal**: All `on*` attributes removed (`onclick`, `onerror`, `onload`, `onmouseover`, etc.)\n- **Dangerous URI neutralization**: `javascript:`, `vbscript:`, `data:text/html` URIs in `href`/`src`/`action`/etc. are neutralized (handles HTML entity encoding, backtick quoting, unquoted values)\n- **Dangerous tag removal**: `<iframe>`, `<object>`, `<embed>`, `<applet>`, `<svg>`, `<math>`, `<base>` tags removed\n- **Style safety**: CSS `expression()` and `javascript:` in style attributes removed; style tags with embedded HTML (mutation XSS) removed\n- **Safe content preserved**: Legitimate `data:image/png` URIs, CSS `<style>` tags, `<meta charset>`, form elements, tables, etc. all preserved"}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":684,"cache_read_input_tokens":46744,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":684,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":1,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"2b92adfa-8d45-4da0-8943-5a974e8fc702","uuid":"19bff473-5154-40e7-80a1-ae0dc26445e0"}
